name: rule-engine closed-loop end-to-end reports a per-step status summary for every chain phase
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/closed-loop-test.sh" --end-to-end --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=config-import' out.txt && grep -q 'step=plugin-install' out.txt && grep -q 'step=rule-test' out.txt && grep -q 'step=severity-resolve' out.txt && grep -q 'step=suppression' out.txt && grep -q 'step=cache-hit' out.txt && grep -q 'step=formatter' out.txt && grep -q 'step=doctor-explain' out.txt && grep -q 'step=deprecation-migration' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
